rulings.Case Title: GRAHAM ULVESTAD et al VS. DAVID NORAVIAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 31, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF GRAHAM ULVESTAD, and, JAMES SANGUINETTI MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Grant Summary Adjudication as to defenses 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 and 14. Plaintiff shifts burden by citing defendants factually devoid special interrogatory responses and plaintiff does not present competent controverting evidence. Deny Summary Adjudication as to seventh defense, mitigation - Trial Issue of Fact as to whether plaintiff mitigated the damages. =(302/REQ)
